'''Arthen Brutt''' was a [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]].

==Biography==
He was a regular at the [[Mud Puddle]] [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] on [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]] where he was approached by the rogue [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] trainee [[Dal Konur]]. Brutt had made a number of trips to [[Mount Tantiss/Legends|Mount Tantiss]] on [[Wayland/Legends|Wayland]] and had gathered together a number of artifacts belonging to the late [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]]. Konur desired a [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]], and so got the location of Brutt's warehouse on Wayland from him.

Brutt was later spoken to by agents of [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] who had tasked them with capturing Konur.

{{Char-stub}}
